title: lithocarpus paniculatus
intro: Lithocarpus paniculatus, also known as the California Nutmeg or California Tanbark Oak, is a tree species native to the western United States and China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus paniculatus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus paniculatus include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being.
